description: Repository-scope audit for the strict no-detuning multitone-SQR study.
load_instructions: Load `prior_audit.json` as JSON and inspect the documented result rows and metadata.

strict_scope_mismatches.issue: The main optimizer allowed d_omega, so it does not answer the no-artificial-detuning question directly.

strict_scope_mismatches.evidence: scripts/run_study.py and scripts/run_echo_comparison.py both use parameters=("d_lambda", "d_alpha", "d_omega").
strict_scope_mismatches.issue: Both the direct and echoed follow-up optimizers allowed d_omega.

strict_scope_mismatches.evidence: README and scripts/run_study.py describe echoed/complex/basis-expanded families with d_omega optimization.
strict_scope_mismatches.issue: The study explored richer waveform families outside the strict simultaneous shared-line amplitude-plus-azimuth ansatz and also allowed d_omega.

strict_scope_mismatches.evidence: Execution summary cites native-rich extensions and CPSQR echoed cases rather than the strict simultaneous ansatz studied here.
strict_scope_mismatches.issue: Repository-level positive strict-SQR claims refer to broader native-rich or echoed constructions rather than the strict no-detuning shared-line multitone model.
